from manim import *

class CarGoingUphill(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        car = SVGMobject("car.svg").scale(0.5)
        road = Line(LEFT * 3, RIGHT * 3).set_color(YELLOW)
        hill = Line(LEFT * 3, RIGHT * 3).set_color(GREEN).shift(UP * 2)
        self.play(ShowCreation(road), ShowCreation(hill))
        self.wait()
        car.shift(UP * 2)
        self.play(MoveAlongPath(car, hill), run_time=3)
        self.wait()
